summary: Completed testing of Legal/Terms implementation and PRO Plan upgrade features. All 13 backend tests pass. Frontend tests verified Terms page, booking form terms checkbox, Settings PRO section, and booking detail modal terms card.
seed_data_creation: Created test booking with terms_accepted=true via UI
context_for_next_testing_agent: Legal/Terms and PRO Plan features fully tested. Fixed plan_updated_at datetime serialization bug in /app/backend/routes/plan.py. All features working: Terms page with 11 articles including Article 10, booking form terms checkbox with validation, Settings PRO section with plan badge and upgrade/downgrade, booking detail modal terms acceptance card, email disclaimer template.

legal_terms.GET /api/legal/terms: PASS - Returns Terms of Use with 11 articles including Article 10 'Odpovědnost za realizaci rezervací'
legal_terms.GET /api/legal/reservation-terms: PASS - Returns checkbox text and email disclaimer
legal_terms./terms page: PASS - Displays all 11 articles with correct content

booking_terms_validation.BookingPage terms checkbox: PASS - Visible with correct text and 'Více informací' link
booking_terms_validation.BookingPage form validation: PASS - Shows error toast when terms not accepted

pro_plan.GET /api/plan/status: PASS - Returns plan info with features
pro_plan.SettingsPage PRO section: PASS - Shows plan badge (FREE/PRO) and upgrade/downgrade buttons

bookings_detail.BookingsPage detail modal: PASS - Shows terms acceptance info card with 'Souhlas s podmínkami'

email_templates.reservation_created_teacher: PASS - Includes 'Důležité informace' disclaimer with yellow background

bug_fixed.issue: plan_updated_at datetime serialization error in GET /api/plan/status
bug_fixed.root_cause: plan_updated_at from database was already a string but code tried to call .isoformat() on it
bug_fixed.fix: Added type check to handle both datetime objects and strings in /app/backend/routes/plan.py
